previous_response_id = read_last_response(bot_name, category)
        if previous_response_id:
            logger.info(f"[AI-AZURE] Continuing thread {category}: {previous_response_id}")
        payload = {
            "model":        "gpt-4o",
            "user":         bot_name,
            "temperature":  0.85,
            "instructions": enhanced_instruction,
            "input":        [{"role": "user", "content": prompt_text}],
        }
        if previous_response_id:
            payload["previous_response_id"] = previous_response_id
        headers = {"Content-Type": "application/json", "api-key": api_key}
        logger.info(f"[AI-AZURE] Sending to {ai_endpoint} | prompt_chars={len(prompt_text)} | prompt={prompt_text}")
        response = requests.post(ai_endpoint, headers=headers, json=payload, timeout=60)
